caption: A screen capture shows a video call interface featuring a complex digital mind map and a participant in a small overlay window. The participant is a man wearing a grey baseball cap and a dark shirt, appearing in the top right of the screen. The main area displays a dark background with a network of circular icons connected by blue and green lines. Legible text labels within the map include "insights $\rightarrow$ introduction $\rightarrow$ Rumis," "Rural Community Food System," "Health Equity," "Sustainable Food," "Healthy Food," "Food Systems," and "Productive Land." Browser tabs at the top of the window include titles such as "Trust & Learning by Systemini," "Future of Society by Systemini," and "insights $\rightarrow$ introduction $\rightarrow$ Rumis." Throughout the sequence, the visual elements remain static, with no visible movement from the man or changes to the diagram.
